languages.text: "Выбор места для нашей встречи я нахожу несколько неординарным, но признаю, что подобная обстановка вполне настраивает на философский лад. Итак, {name}, поведайте, чем занят ваш пытливый разум?"
languages.translation_comment: Эо-ганн чинно вплывает в помещение и усаживается рядом с ВТ на полу, сложив лапки на пузике, сервочереп летает вокруг.
Эо-ганн чинно вплывает в помещение и усаживается рядом с ВТ на полу, сложив лапки на пузике, сервочереп летает вокруг.

languages.text: "I find the choice of venue for our meeting somewhat unconventional, but I don't deny that the setting is conducive to philosophical contemplation. So tell me, {name}, what topic is currently occupying your inquiring mind?"
languages.original_text: "Выбор места для нашей встречи я нахожу несколько неординарным, но признаю, что подобная обстановка вполне настраивает на философский лад. Итак, {name}, поведайте, чем занят ваш пытливый разум?"

traits.locale_text: "I find the choice of venue for our meeting somewhat unconventional, but I don't deny that the setting is conducive to philosophical contemplation. So tell me, {name}, what topic is currently occupying your inquiring mind?"

"I find the choice of venue for our meeting somewhat unconventional, but I don't deny that the setting is conducive to philosophical contemplation. So tell me, {name}, what topic is currently occupying your inquiring mind?"

"I find the choice of venue for our meeting somewhat unconventional, but I don't deny that the setting is conducive to philosophical contemplation. So tell me, {name}, what topic is currently occupying your inquiring mind?"

languages.text: «El lugar escogido para nuestro encuentro se me antoja poco convencional, pero no negaré que es un entorno propicio para las reflexiones filosóficas. Dígame, {name}, ¿qué asunto atribula en estos momentos su inquisitiva mente?».
languages.original_text: "I find the choice of venue for our meeting somewhat unconventional, but I don't deny that the setting is conducive to philosophical contemplation. So tell me, {name}, what topic is currently occupying your inquiring mind?"

traits.locale_text: «El lugar escogido para nuestro encuentro se me antoja poco convencional, pero no negaré que es un entorno propicio para las reflexiones filosóficas. Dígame, {name}, ¿qué asunto atribula en estos momentos su inquisitiva mente?».

languages.text: “此番会面所选地点的确有些不合常规，但我并不否认，这里的氛围的确适合进行哲学思考。请告诉我，{name}，您那求知的心智在思索什么问题？”
languages.original_text: "I find the choice of venue for our meeting somewhat unconventional, but I don't deny that the setting is conducive to philosophical contemplation. So tell me, {name}, what topic is currently occupying your inquiring mind?"

traits.locale_text: “此番会面所选地点的确有些不合常规，但我并不否认，这里的氛围的确适合进行哲学思考。请告诉我，{name}，您那求知的心智在思索什么问题？”

languages.text: « Ce lieu de rencontre me semble peu conventionnel, mais je ne nie pas que cet environnement semble adapté à des réflexions philosophiques. Dites-moi, {name}, quel sujet vous occupe actuellement l'esprit ? »
languages.original_text: "I find the choice of venue for our meeting somewhat unconventional, but I don't deny that the setting is conducive to philosophical contemplation. So tell me, {name}, what topic is currently occupying your inquiring mind?"

traits.locale_text: « Ce lieu de rencontre me semble peu conventionnel, mais je ne nie pas que cet environnement semble adapté à des réflexions philosophiques. Dites-moi, {name}, quel sujet vous occupe actuellement l'esprit ? »

languages.text: "Buluşmamız için seçtiğiniz mekânı biraz sıra dışı buluyorum ama ortamın felsefi düşünmeye elverişli olduğunu da inkâr edemem. Söyleyin bana, şu anda araştırmacı zihninizi hangi konu meşgul ediyor?"
languages.original_text: "I find the choice of venue for our meeting somewhat unconventional, but I don't deny that the setting is conducive to philosophical contemplation. So tell me, {name}, what topic is currently occupying your inquiring mind?"

traits.locale_text: "Buluşmamız için seçtiğiniz mekânı biraz sıra dışı buluyorum ama ortamın felsefi düşünmeye elverişli olduğunu da inkâr edemem. Söyleyin bana, şu anda araştırmacı zihninizi hangi konu meşgul ediyor?"

languages.text: 「我々の会合の場所の選択はいささか型破りだと感じますが、この環境が哲学的思索に適していることは否定しません。さて、{name}、あなたの探究心を今占めているのはどのような主題でしょうか？」
languages.original_text: "I find the choice of venue for our meeting somewhat unconventional, but I don't deny that the setting is conducive to philosophical contemplation. So tell me, {name}, what topic is currently occupying your inquiring mind?"

traits.locale_text: 「我々の会合の場所の選択はいささか型破りだと感じますが、この環境が哲学的思索に適していることは否定しません。さて、{name}、あなたの探究心を今占めているのはどのような主題でしょうか？」

languages.text: "Ich halte den Ort unseres Treffens zwar für etwas unkonventionell, streite aber nicht ab, dass die Umgebung philosophischer Kontemplation zuträglich ist. Also sagt mir, {name}, welches Thema beschäftigt Euch im Augenblick?"
languages.original_text: "I find the choice of venue for our meeting somewhat unconventional, but I don't deny that the setting is conducive to philosophical contemplation. So tell me, {name}, what topic is currently occupying your inquiring mind?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich halte den Ort unseres Treffens zwar für etwas unkonventionell, streite aber nicht ab, dass die Umgebung philosophischer Kontemplation zuträglich ist. Also sagt mir, {name}, welches Thema beschäftigt Euch im Augenblick?"
